article.title: What Is EEAT in SEO - A Simple Guide for Small Business Owners
article.body_markdown:
EEAT stands for Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness. It is how Google evaluates your content.

**Experience** - Have you actually done this? Share real stories, real numbers, real results.

**Expertise** - Do you know your field? Mention specific tools and frameworks.

**Authoritativeness** - Do others recognize you? Get backlinks from reputable sites.

**Trustworthiness** - Are you honest? Cite sources. Admit failures. Be transparent.

Every article you publish should demonstrate all four signals.

I built [SEO Spark](https://seospark.net) to automatically structure articles around EEAT. Keyword strategy + scoring built in. 3 free articles.
